name: Quanta Services, Inc.
description: Quanta Services, Inc. is a leading specialized contracting services company, delivering comprehensive infrastructure solutions for the utility, renewable energy, communications, pipeline, and energy industries. Based in Houston, Texas, the company provides engineering, procurement, construction, and maintenance services for electric power transmission and distribution networks, substation facilities, and renewable energy projects. Quanta is a key player in the modernization of the North American power grid, supporting the transition to sustainable energy and ensuring the reliability of critical infrastructure through its extensive workforce and technical expertise.

investment_theses.company_type: Infrastructure Services / Grid Modernization for Reshoring
